summary: Decided to remove skill files and associated data from the repository as part of an ongoing cleanup effort (part 17), deleting numerous skill definitions including top-web-vulnerabilities, track-management, trello-automation, trigger-dev, turborepo-caching, tutorial-engineer, twilio-communications, twitter-automation, typescript-advanced-types, typescript-expert, typescript-pro, ui-skills, ui-ux-designer, and ui-ux-pro-max along with their associated data files.
